resources.string: You appear to be offline. Check your connection and try again.
The server is temporarily unavailable. Please try again.
Secure connection failed. Please try again later.
An error occurred loading the page.

Nerava collects your location data to detect nearby EV chargers, show local merchant deals within walking distance, and verify your presence for charging rewards. Your location is sent to our servers to match you with chargers and merchants. Location data is not shared with third parties.

Nerava collects your location in the background to notify you when you arrive at a merchant and automatically verify your visit for exclusive deals, even when the app is not open. Background location data is used only for arrival detection and visit verification.
Notifications about your active charging session
